context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch
context.usage_scenario: Triggered randomly when happiness >= 90; unlocked at relationship level 4; plays for 8 seconds; spawns music note particle effects

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with fully raised crest, beak open, head tilted upward
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1-2: crest raising, beak opening, Frame 3-4: head tilted up, beak fully open (4x3px), Frame 5-6: beak closing slightly, Frame 7-8: beak opening again (singing rhythm)

visual_specification.details: Crest fully erect at 5-6px height; beak opens to 4x3px in frames 3-4; head tilted upward approximately 15 degrees; eyes wide open; body slightly puffed

relationships.shared_with: Same base structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_happy (open beak vs closed), echo_idle (crest raised, beak open)
